supply_chain.dependencies: The Company is dependent upon various financial institutions to execute electronic funds transfer and paper check payments as part of client payroll, tax and other money movement services
supply_chain.risks: A systemic shutdown of the banking industry would impede ability to process payments on behalf of payroll, tax and other money movement services clients. Failure of a bank with whom a significant number of clients may bank could prevent or materially delay recovery of funds. Supply-chain disruptions mentioned as a risk factor.

regulatory_risks: Compliance with federal, state and foreign privacy, data protection, AI and cybersecurity-related laws including GDPR, CPRA, and DOJ Data Security Program under Executive Order 14117
EU Artificial Intelligence Act imposing requirements on providers of certain types of AI services
Health Insurance Portability and Accountability Act of 1996 (HIPAA) for insurance services and PEO
Bank Secrecy Act of 1970 as amended by USA PATRIOT Act of 2001 (BSA) for U.S. money movement and prepaid access
Electronic Funds Transfer Act and Regulation E for prepaid access offerings
Canadian Proceeds of Crime (Money Laundering) and Terrorist Financing Act - FINTRAC registration
Retail Payment Activities Act - Bank of Canada registration requirement
Fair Credit Reporting Act for employee background screening services
State licensing requirements for PEO and Certified PEO status with IRS
SEC and Department of Labor regulations for retirement services (fiduciary standard)
FINRA regulations for broker-dealer operations
Affordable Care Act compliance requirements
Tax credit laws and regulations subject to renewal, amendment or rescission
Foreign Corrupt Practices Act and U.K. Bribery Act 2010
Economic and trade sanctions programs administered by U.S. Treasury Department's Office of Foreign Assets Control
Anti-money laundering laws and regulations in multiple jurisdictions
State and local AI legislation in the U.S.
Changes in federal, state or local tax laws affecting client obligations
Changes in laws governing co-employment arrangements for PEO
Changes in health and welfare plan regulations for PEOs

sanction_risks: Economic and trade sanctions programs prohibit or restrict transactions with specified countries, their governments and nationals, and specially designated individuals including narcotics traffickers and terrorists
Exposure to countries of concern under DOJ Data Security Program (Executive Order 14117) restricting transfers of sensitive personal data of U.S. persons
